scope.anchor_definition: earliest of the three synchronized AKE transfers into the common receiver

native_coverage.internal_native_gap: public normal transaction pages do not cover Internal Txns or address-level trace history

coverage.boundary_rule: first official block with integer timestamp >= ceil(target timestamp); state anchor is previous block

fifo.method: single chronological FIFO; opening inventory is a separate first lot; later inflows append after existing lots

evidence: three AKE transfers from two reviewed senders arrived within 121.5 seconds
d49 sent two adjacent direct normal BNB transfers totaling 0.0015 BNB
the target began repeated router executions shortly afterward

unresolved: economic ownership of each FIFO-attributed token unit
internal-native address history and contract-mediated BNB funding
official entity mapping for explorer label OKX: DEX Router 2
downstream use of quote assets after receipt-level recovery
